description: A branded platform propagation chain. Shows a post/content card at top, then a horizontal sequence of social/communication platform nodes (with real brand colors) linked by animated flow particles. Use when a story shows content spreading across channels — LinkedIn → Slack → GitHub → email, etc. Supports up to 5 channels.

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Title above the template, e.g. 'HOW THE LIE SPREAD'
fields.POST_AUTHOR: Author line shown on the content card, e.g. 'Sarah K. — Senior Engineer at Stripe'
fields.POST_TEXT: Excerpt of the post or message being shared, e.g. 'Just updated our axios dep — the new version fixes the memory leak we've been chasing. Clean install, no issues.'
fields.SPREAD_LABEL: Bottom badge label, e.g. 'APPEARED ORGANIC' or 'LOOKED LEGITIMATE'
fields.CHANNEL_1: First platform in the chain. Use exact names: LINKEDIN, TWITTER, X, GITHUB, SLACK, DISCORD, EMAIL, REDDIT, TELEGRAM, WHATSAPP, NPM, PYPI, HACKERNEWS, MEDIUM — e.g. 'LINKEDIN'
fields.METRIC_1: Stat or descriptor for channel 1, e.g. '14 colleagues shared'
fields.METRIC_2: Stat for channel 2, e.g. 'posted in 3 dev channels'
fields.METRIC_3: Stat for channel 3, e.g. 'referenced in 8 PRs'
fields.CHANNEL_4: Fourth platform (leave blank if fewer than 4), e.g. 'EMAIL'
fields.METRIC_4: Stat for channel 4, e.g. 'forwarded to team leads'
fields.CHANNEL_5: Fifth platform (leave blank if fewer than 5), e.g. ''
